howItWorks.subtitle: From the end of your meeting to a WhatsApp report: under 3 minutes, fully automatic.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Plug in Google Meet or Teams, drag an audio file, or start recording from your mic. RapidoMeet adapts to your workflow.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our engine identifies every voice, every decision, every task, every prospect. Everything is structured into actionable data in real time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: CRM updated, tasks assigned, calendar filled, report sent on WhatsApp. OpenClaw orchestrates everything while you hang up.

features.title: Everything that should
features.subtitle:
One platform. Seven critical features.
Zero manual action after your meetings.
features.mainTitle: Every word captured. Every decision extracted.
features.mainDesc: Whisper + Deepgram for ultra-precise FR/EN transcription with speaker identification. AI automatically extracts tasks, decisions, prospects and sentiments — ready to act on.
features.card1Title: Your CRM updates while you hang up.
features.card1Desc: Prospects detected in meetings are automatically created in RapidoCRM. Opportunities move through the pipeline, activities are logged, tasks assigned — no manual entry.
features.card2Desc: "Let's meet again in 2 weeks" becomes a Google Calendar event created automatically, with all participants invited and reminders set for mentioned deadlines.
features.card3Desc: Trigger your N8N workflows directly from meetings. Weekly digest, email sequence, invoice generation, Slack broadcast — your business automations fire at the right time.
features.card4Title: The report hits your phone. In 3 minutes.
features.card4Desc: Report received on WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord or HTML email in under 3 minutes. Reply directly from WhatsApp to trigger additional actions — your agent listens.
features.card5Title: AI learns your vocabulary. Your clients. Your codes.
features.card5Desc: RapidoMeet learns from your company. Connect your documents, processes, business glossary. The agent uses this context for even more precise extractions with every meeting.
features.card6Title: Your brand. Your rules. Your agent.
features.card6Desc: Customize your AI agent, email templates in your brand colors, report styles and business rules. RapidoMeet adapts to your image, not the other way around.

testimonials.t1Text: "Before RapidoMeet, I spent 45 minutes after each client meeting writing up notes. Now the report arrives on my WhatsApp while I'm hanging up."
testimonials.t2Text: "The RapidoCRM connection is stunning. Prospects detected in meetings appear directly in the pipeline. My team never misses a contact anymore."
testimonials.t3Text: "The post-meeting N8N scenarios changed everything. We automated our prospect follow-up process and our closing rate improved by 23% in 2 months."

faq.title: Everything you
faq.q1: Does RapidoMeet work if I don't use RapidoCRM?
faq.a1: Yes. RapidoMeet works standalone. The RapidoCRM connection is a bonus for RapidoSoftware suite users, but you can use it with your own tools via N8N and our open APIs.
faq.a2: All transcriptions are encrypted at rest and in transit. You own your data. We never use your meetings to train our models. AWS Europe hosting, GDPR compliant.
faq.a3: Our engine combining Whisper and Deepgram reaches 85-95% accuracy depending on audio quality. Enterprise RAG further improves accuracy by integrating your business vocabulary and your organization's proper nouns.
faq.a4: Yes. Import any MP3, WAV, M4A or MP4 file. RapidoMeet processes it exactly like a live meeting: transcription, extraction, automatic actions.
faq.q5: How long after the meeting do I receive the report?
faq.a5: On average 2 to 4 minutes after the meeting ends. For imported audio files, count 1 minute per 10 minutes of recording.
faq.q6: Can I customize the report format?
faq.a6: Yes, completely. Through the Skills Markdown system, you configure the format for each meeting type (sales, technical, retrospective...). You can also upload your brand guidelines for emails and PDFs.
faq.a7: Yes. RapidoMeet supports French, English and Arabic (Pro plan). Our Whisper engine is trained on all three languages. Reports can be generated in your preferred language, regardless of the meeting language.
faq.a8: You upload your documents (PDF, DOCX, TXT): business glossary, client lists, internal processes. The agent indexes and uses them to improve extraction accuracy — your proper nouns, project codes, and specific terminology are recognized and correctly transcribed.

pricing.subtitle: All plans include your OpenClaw instance hosted on AWS by BraindCode. Prices exclude hosting fees (€99/month) and Anthropic API costs.
